ontrace.name: OnTrace
ontrace.description: Full traceability from raw material to finished product. Combine lot tracking, recall management, and quality control in one platform.

problem.title: Are you experiencing traceability gaps on your production lines?
items: Cannot identify root cause of quality issues
Real-time lot tracking from a single screen

features.title: Lot & Batch Tracking
features.desc: Track every product from raw material to finished goods. Complete lot-based history.

features.title: Recall Management
features.desc: Identify affected products in seconds. Scope analysis is generated automatically.

features.title: Quality Control
features.desc: Monitor quality parameters in real time. Automatic alerts on deviations.

features.title: Barcode & QR Integration
features.desc: Works seamlessly with your existing barcode and QR systems.

features.title: Regulatory Compliance
features.desc: Ready for IATF 16949, FDA 21 CFR Part 11, BRC, and IFS standards.

features.title: Reporting & Analytics
features.desc: Traceability reports, trend analysis, and KPI dashboards.

ontrace.ctaTitle: See OnTrace on Your Own Production Line
ontrace.ctaDesc: See how we can transform your traceability system in a 15-minute demo.

onoptima.name: OnOptima
onoptima.description: Optimize your production processes with AI-powered analytics. Identify bottlenecks and take automatic actions.

problem.title: Can't identify inefficiencies in your production processes?

features.title: AI Optimization Engine
features.desc: Automatically detect improvement opportunities in your production processes with AI.

features.title: Bottleneck Analysis
features.desc: Identify bottlenecks on the production line in real time and get solution recommendations.

features.title: Capacity Planning
features.desc: Optimize production capacity based on demand. Maximize resource utilization.

features.title: Energy Efficiency
features.desc: Monitor energy consumption and identify reduction opportunities.

features.title: Predictive Analytics
features.desc: Learn from historical data to predict future production performance.

features.title: Action Management
features.desc: Automatically create and track action plans for identified opportunities.

onoptima.ctaTitle: Start Your Efficiency Revolution with OnOptima
onoptima.ctaDesc: See AI-powered optimization with your own data in a 15-minute demo.

onoee.name: OnOEE
onoee.tagline: Real-Time OEE Tracking and Performance Analysis
onoee.description: Monitor your availability, performance, and quality metrics in real time. Instantly detect OEE losses.

problem.title: Are you measuring OEE values correctly?

features.title: Live OEE Dashboard
features.desc: Track availability, performance, and quality metrics instantly.

features.title: Loss Analysis
features.desc: Categorize planned and unplanned downtime. Identify biggest loss sources.

features.title: Shift Reports
features.desc: Shift-based performance comparisons and trend analysis.

features.title: Target Tracking
features.desc: Set OEE targets and monitor actual performance.

features.title: Benchmark
features.desc: Benchmark across lines, plants, and industry averages.

features.title: Auto Reporting
features.desc: Daily, weekly, and monthly OEE reports generated automatically.

onoee.ctaDesc: Experience real-time OEE tracking in a 15-minute demo.

onintegra.name: OnIntegra
onintegra.tagline: Seamless Integration with Your ERP Systems
onintegra.description: Achieve bidirectional data flow with SAP, Microsoft Dynamics, Oracle, and other ERP systems.

problem.title: Is there a disconnect between ERP and production data?

items: Full alignment of ERP and field data

features.title: SAP Integration
features.desc: Ready connectors for SAP S/4HANA and ECC. RFC, BAPI, and IDoc support.

features.title: Microsoft Dynamics
features.desc: Bidirectional data flow with Dynamics 365. Work order and inventory sync.

features.title: REST & OPC UA
features.desc: Connect to any system with open APIs. OPC UA and MQTT support.

features.title: Data Mapping
features.desc: Map data with drag & drop interface. Define transformation rules.

features.title: Error Handling
features.desc: Automatic retry and notification on connection interruptions.

features.title: Data Validation
features.desc: Automatic data validation and quality control before transfer.

onintegra.ctaDesc: See how your ERP integration will work in a 15-minute demo.

oncnc.name: OnCNC
oncnc.tagline: Automatic Data Collection from Your CNC Machines
oncnc.description: Automatically collect data from Fanuc, Siemens, Heidenhain, and other CNC controllers. Monitor machine utilization rates and production data in real time.

problem.title: Do you know your CNC machines' real performance?
items: Program vs actual time not measured

features.title: Multi-Brand Support
features.desc: Fanuc, Siemens, Heidenhain, Mazak and more. All your CNCs on one platform.

features.title: Cycle Time Analysis
features.desc: Measure program time, cutting time, and wait times separately.

features.title: Tool Management
features.desc: Track tool life, optimize change times.

features.title: Alarm Management
features.desc: Capture and categorize CNC alarms and errors instantly.

features.title: Program Tracking
features.desc: Track which program ran when and how many parts it produced.

features.title: Capacity Planning
features.desc: Analyze machine occupancy rates and plan capacity.

oncnc.ctaDesc: Experience your CNC data collection system in a 15-minute demo.

ontmc.name: OnTMC
ontmc.tagline: OPC UA TMC Compliant Tobacco Industry Solution
ontmc.description: Fully compliant data collection with Tobacco Machine Communication (TMC) standard. Direct communication with cigarette machines.

problem.title: Having TMC compliance issues?
items: Cannot consolidate data across machine brands

features.title: TMC Protocol Support
features.desc: Full OPC UA TMC 1.0 and 2.0 compliance. Direct communication with Hauni, GD, Focke machines.

features.title: Multi-Brand Machines
features.desc: Collect and consolidate data from different cigarette machine brands.

features.title: Track & Trace
features.desc: Full traceability from tobacco leaf to final product.

features.title: Regulatory Reports
features.desc: Automatic reporting compliant with regulatory authorities.

features.title: Production Efficiency
features.desc: Machine-level OEE, scrap, and waste analysis.

features.title: Packaging Tracking
features.desc: Track every step from packaging line to shipment.

ontmc.ctaDesc: Experience our TMC compliant solution in a 15-minute demo.

onsmartforms.name: OnSmartForms
onsmartforms.description: Automate data collection, approval workflows, and reporting with digital forms. Completely eliminate paper-based processes.

features.title: Form Designer
features.desc: Design your own forms with drag-and-drop. No coding required.

features.title: Mobile Data Collection
features.desc: Collect field data from tablets and phones. Works offline too.

features.title: Approval Workflows
features.desc: Define multi-step approval processes and send automatic notifications.

features.title: Validation Rules
features.desc: Prevent errors with data entry rules. Required fields and range controls.

features.title: Audit Trail
features.desc: Who changed what, when? Full audit trail for regulatory readiness.

features.title: Integration
features.desc: Automatically transfer collected data to ERP and MES systems.

onsmartforms.ctaDesc: Experience your digital form system in a 15-minute demo.

onmonitora.name: OnMonitora
onmonitora.tagline: Monitor Your Machines in Real Time
onmonitora.description: Monitor all your production equipment from a single screen. Alarm management, status tracking, and maintenance planning.

problem.title: Do you know your machines' status in real time?

features.title: Live Monitoring Panel
features.desc: See the status of all your machines from one screen. Color-coded view.

features.title: Alarm Management
features.desc: Capture machine alarms instantly and notify relevant personnel.

features.title: Predictive Maintenance
features.desc: Learn from machine data to predict failures before they happen.

features.title: Energy Monitoring
features.desc: Monitor and optimize machine-level energy consumption.

features.title: Maintenance Planning
features.desc: Create and track preventive maintenance schedules.

features.title: Performance Benchmarking
features.desc: Cross-machine performance comparison and trend analysis.

onmonitora.ctaTitle: Take Control of Your Machines with OnMonitora
onmonitora.ctaDesc: Experience your machine monitoring system in a 15-minute demo.
